title: Campaign Monitor vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor and AWeber. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for agencies, solopreneurs, and ecommerce.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs AWeber: Detailed Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and AWeber are two established email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management and design flexibility, while AWeber prioritizes simplicity and offers a free tier for beginners. This comparison helps you choose based on your business size, budget, and specific needs.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple brands or clients as an agency
You need advanced automation and journey design capabilities
You require professional-grade analytics and segmentation
choose_b_if: You're a solopreneur or blogger wanting a free starting point
You prioritize simplicity and ease of use
You want better customer support ratings and value affordability

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than AWeber?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Campaign Monitor is better for agencies and teams managing multiple brands with advanced automation requirements. AWeber is better for beginners and solopreneurs who want simplicity and a free tier. Both are solid platforms with different strengths.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is cheaper overall due to its free tier supporting up to 500 subscribers. Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month with no free option. However, once you outgrow AWeber's free plan, Campaign Monitor may offer better value for agencies managing multiple clients.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists in standard formats like CSV. Most migrations are straightforward, though you'll need to manually recreate campaigns and automation workflows in Campaign Monitor since each platform has different automation architectures.
